description: This file contains a collection of SCSS mixins, functions, variables, and configuration settings for implementing Responsive Font Sizes (RFS). It automates the scaling of font sizes, paddings, margins, and other properties based on screen dimensions, facilitating responsive design. The file also includes error checking and utility functions to handle units and calculations within SCSS.

methods.name: divide
methods.description: Performs division with precision, handling units, and returns a calculated number suitable for SCSS usage.

methods.name: rfs-value
methods.description: Calculates the responsive font size or property value based on predefined parameters and media queries.

methods.name: rfs-fluid-value
methods.description: Computes fluid responsive values that adapt between minimum and maximum sizes depending on viewport with media queries.
